items.title: Sam Altman takes the stand in trial against Elon Musk
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has begun his testimony against Elon Musk in a high-profile jury trial in a California federal courtroom. Altman, alongside OpenAI president Greg Brockman,...
